title: Force valor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:YodaTyranusduel.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] utilizes Force valor to overcome the infirmities of his old age and battle Count Dooku.]]

'''Force Valor''' was a [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] that increased the resolve, accuracy, and speed of one's self and one's allies. Tapping into [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] could increase the rate at which one's capacities functioned, allowing the body to [[Force speed/Legends|move and react quicker]], [[Force jump/Legends|leap higher and farther]], [[Force punch|strike more powerfully]], and fight with improved accuracy. The ability shared similarities to [[Force Body]] and [[Enhance Attribute]] and [[Battlemind]], as well as its [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] counterpart [[Force Enrage|Force rage]].

[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] used this ability to overcome the infirmities of old age, which was necessary for a practitioner of [[Form IV/Legends|Form IV]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]].

Other users of Force valor included [[Meetra Surik]] and [[Revan/Legends|Revan]].

{{Force-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]], this power was known as "Force Mind", and allowed the Jedi using it to boost the physical capabilities of his allies. Understanding of this power greatly aided a Jedi in the use of the [[Battle meditation/Legends|Battle meditation]] ability.

In the ''Star Wars Revised Core Rulebook'', this power still exists as above, providing a boost to the physical abilities of the Jedi's allies. However, there were also two more abilities which were closely related. '''[[Battlemind]]''' was a power centered around a Jedi's connection to the Force, a vague precognition allowing him to strike with increased accuracy. '''Enhance Ability''' was similar to Force Mind, but was instead used to bolster the physical abilities of the Jedi.
